description: Route a research query to the best backend and save a cited report: Parallel Chat API (core model) for general research, Perplexity sonar-pro-search for academic paper searches. Auto-routes by query content; FORCE_BACKEND overrides.
rules: read-only — never mutates a remote service
auto-routes: academic keywords (papers, DOI, pubmed, peer-reviewed) -> perplexity; else -> parallel
query text is transmitted to api.parallel.ai (PARALLEL_API_KEY) and/or openrouter.ai (OPENROUTER_API_KEY)
report (text or --json) written to record_store; citations + source URLs + DOIs preserved
no API key / no network -> porter writes a placeholder output so the contract holds
usage: Set QUERY (required). Optional FORCE_BACKEND (parallel|perplexity), OUTPUT_NAME (default research.md). Output: ${RECORD_STORE}/${OUTPUT_NAME}.
limitation: Requires PARALLEL_API_KEY and/or OPENROUTER_API_KEY plus the 'openai'/'requests' packages and network access to return real results. Parallel core model may take up to 5 minutes. Cannot access proprietary or paywalled databases.

vars.QUERY: Recent advances in CRISPR gene editing 2025
